Senior Go Engineer

Acme Cloud

Dublin, Ireland (Hybrid)

About the role

We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to build our anti-abuse platform in Go. You will work with Kafka, PostgreSQL and Kubernetes on high-throughput services.

Requirements

  • 5+ years of backend experience, strong in Go
  • Experience with distributed systems and gRPC

What we offer

  • Visa sponsorship and relocation package (Critical Skills Permit)
  • Salary 90,000 - 120,000 EUR per year
Acme Cloud Ltd. All rights reserved.
